DEAN HEDANI, PROTEM JDG; C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. NEGOTIATED DISPO REACHED AND READ INTO THE RECORD: DEFT MOVED OUT OF 665 6TH AVE, #4 AND AGREED TO GIVE BACK KEYS TODAY AND REMOVE ALL PROPERTY OUT IN 48 HRS. PLTF TO RETAIN $600.00 SECURITY DEPOSIT AND WAIVES $375.00 BALANCE IN BACK RENT. EACH SIDE BEARS OWN COSTS AND AGREES NOT TO SUE IN REGARDS TO TENANCY OF SAID PREMISE.
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT SIOREK, CARIANN
PHOTOCOPY FOR PLAINTIFF LIU, SUI YING

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SIOREK, CARIANN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 665-6TH AVE, #4, S.F., LEASE FORFEITED, PLTF MAY KEEP SECURITY DEPOSIT IN AMT OF $600.00
